Do we use cookies?Yes (Cookies are small files that a site or its service provider transfers to your computers hard drive through your Web browser (if you allow) that enables the sites or service providers systems to recognize your browser and capture and remember certain information

ident_heading: Do we disclose any information to outside parties?
heading_content_part: Do we disclose any information to outside parties?We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your personally identifiable information.

decoder_heading: This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website
ident_heading: This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website
heading_content_part: This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.

decoder_heading: We may also release your information when we believe release is appropriate
ident_heading: We may also release your information when we believe release is appropriate
heading_content_part: We may also release your information when we believe release is appropriate to comply with the law, enforce our site policies, or protect ours or others rights, property, or safety. However, non-personally identifiable visitor information may be provided to other parties for marketing, advertising, or other uses.
Your ConsentBy using our site, you consent to our online privacy policy.
Changes to our Privacy PolicyAny changes to our Privacy Policy will be placed here and will supersede this version of our Policy.

decoder_heading: We will take reasonable steps to draw your attention to any changes in our Policy

heading_content_part: We will take reasonable steps to draw your attention to any changes in our Policy. However, to be on the safe side, we suggest that you read this document each time you use the website to ensure that it still meets with your approval.
